description: Narrow Playbook doctrine-registry and governed-skill adapter.

notes: This adapter is limited to the machine-readable doctrine registry and its governed Project Review and Next Step skill.
The existing Playbook adapter remains the changelog-generator rollout surface and must not be widened.
Roadmap, changelog, package metadata, command surfaces, and existing continuity contracts remain unchanged while the overlapping draft PR is open.

docsUpdateRules: Keep universal doctrine in the registry, repository-specific instructions in owner docs, executable guidance in the governed skill, and live status outside doctrine.
Every promoted doctrine entry requires a stable ID, evidence references, enforcement owner and mechanism, review trigger, and explicit supersession fields.
Do not modify the active path-discipline PR, existing continuity contracts, package metadata, roadmap, changelog, generated runtime outputs, or another repository from this adapter.
